title: Changer FOV
description: Allows you to change the camera viewing angle.
body:
**Changer FOV is a mod that allows the player to remove the vanilla field of view (FOV) limitations, allowing values ​​up to 180 degrees to be set through in-game settings or commands, while maintaining proper camera dynamics when running and shooting.**
_/setfov <number> (for example: /setfov 150). To reset it back to vanilla, just type /setfov without any numbers._
